title: Summarizing Social Media Posts
scenario: Given a social media post of approximately 200 words, write a summary of no more than 50 words that captures the main points, including key hashtags and relevant links.
constraints: Must include key hashtags and relevant links
Summary should be no more than 50 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and structural requirements.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main points of the social media post.
Check if the hashtags mentioned in the summary match the ones provided in the social media post.
Ensure the summary accurately includes relevant links from the social media post.
